text.title: SEO Techniques Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) pinning the shape of a valid checklist artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner is plural pronoun; required fields empty / missing; downstream consumers reject the artefact.

forbidden.pattern: `owner` is a plural pronoun (`team`, `we`, `us`, `everyone`, `engineering`) or empty string.
